issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for SVG optimization.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment and does not support other platforms.

scenarios.name: Vite build-time icon optimization preserving viewBox and animations
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses vite-plugin-svgo with preset-default overrides removeViewBox:false, mergePaths:false, convertShapeToPath:false and multipass; baseline grabs an unrelated svgr plugin with no overrides.

scenarios.name: Custom SVGO plugin tagging path elements through programmatic API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment implements the documented CustomPlugin AST visitor (element.enter checking node.name === 'path') and runs it via optimize(); baseline rewrites SVG with a brittle regex.
